positive_anchors: Epidemiologic evidence on whether mobile phone or radio tower exposure changes brain cancer incidence
Animal or mechanistic studies linking radiofrequency exposure to brain tumor risk
Comparative risk statistics for brain cancer in exposed versus general populations
discriminative_features: Must center on brain cancer, not general cancer
Must discuss exposure-response or incidence comparison
Prefer empirical evidence over opinion-only debate

positive_anchors: Reported frequency and severity of black bear attacks on humans
Causal factors for black bear aggression, especially food or trash attractants
Wildlife management interventions that reduced or attempted to reduce attack behavior
discriminative_features: Trash or food-attraction mechanism should be explicit
Focus on black bears specifically
Include either causes or mitigation outcomes

positive_anchors: Effectiveness of enhanced airport passenger and baggage screening measures
Post-terrorism aviation security upgrades beyond routine screening
Operational outcomes of added personnel, advanced devices, or whole-body imaging
negative_constraints: generic security mention without concrete measures
discriminative_features: Must contain measures beyond baseline screening
Must tie improvements to terrorism-driven safety concerns
Prefer evidence of effectiveness, not policy slogans

positive_anchors: Institutional actions by employers or schools to control email misuse and excess costs
Policies and monitoring approaches for non-work electronic communication abuse
Governance trade-offs between surveillance, privacy, and system abuse prevention
negative_constraints: general internet misuse unrelated to email
email technology features without abuse-control policy
personal communication trends without payer perspective
discriminative_features: Payer or system owner dissatisfaction should be explicit
Must involve anti-abuse controls, not only productivity benefits
Surveillance context should be present

positive_anchors: Space-borne ocean remote sensing methods used in marine science and oceanography
Applications of satellite or SAR data for seabed prospecting and marine operations
Technical development of ocean-focused remote sensing missions and instruments
discriminative_features: Marine context is mandatory
Exclude land-bound science use cases
Technical or applied ocean utility should be clear

positive_anchors: Clinical use of estrogen or hormone replacement therapy for postmenopausal women in Britain
UK-specific policy, prescribing, or outcomes related to estrogen therapy
British development or marketing of estrogen-related suppressing drugs
negative_constraints: global trend reports without UK focus
discriminative_features: Geographic scope must be UK/Britain
Primary hormone axis should be estrogen, not testosterone
Postmenopausal context should be explicit

positive_anchors: Modern piracy cases involving boarding or seizure of vessels
Maritime attacks where control of a boat was forcibly taken
Incident reports connecting boat piracy events with terrorism-linked motives or actors
discriminative_features: Boarding or control transfer is key
Exclude legal state actions
Event must be true piracy, not routine maritime conflict

positive_anchors: Pros and cons of mainstreaming students with physical or mental impairments
Educational outcomes and social benefits for impaired children in inclusive classrooms
Teacher and administrator concerns about resource allocation in mainstream settings
negative_constraints: disability policy unrelated to school integration
opinion pieces without authority or quoted officials
discriminative_features: Mainstream classroom integration is required
Government or official quotation improves authority
Must discuss trade-offs, not one-sided advocacy

positive_anchors: Actions by South American authorities to preserve the Amazon rainforest
Programs or enforcement by official institutions in Amazon countries
Evidence of policy implementation success or failure in Amazon conservation
negative_constraints: indigenous rights debates without conservation action
global climate commentary without local policy action
discriminative_features: Local/official action in South America is central
Need concrete preservation measures
Prefer measurable outcomes or implementation details

positive_anchors: Instances where violence directly delayed or disrupted Ireland peace talks
Chronology of peace-process interruptions attributable to violent acts in Ireland
Causal analyses linking specific attacks to negotiation setbacks
negative_constraints: general conflict updates without peace-talk disruption
peace-talk progress reports without interruption events
discriminative_features: Direct causality between violence and delay is required
Geographic center should be Ireland
Event-level evidence is preferred

positive_anchors: Cuban sugar export volumes and destination countries
Trade data on Cuba sugar importers over time
Policy or leadership context affecting Cuban sugar trade flows
discriminative_features: Must include export and/or importer evidence
Cuba-specific trade focus
Production figures alone are insufficient

positive_anchors: Current project status of the Three Gorges Project including schedule and completion milestones
Cost and budget reporting for Three Gorges construction and operation
Actual or projected electrical output of the completed dam system
discriminative_features: Engineering status metrics are primary
Exclude humanitarian or ecological framing
Need operational progress, cost, or power-generation facts

positive_anchors: Industrial or environmental reuse pathways for end-of-life automobile tires
Specific recycling applications such as asphalt additives, energy recovery, or engineered habitat use
Economic or technical performance of tire-derived products
discriminative_features: Must describe advantageous reuse, not disposal only
Application-level detail is required
Focus on recycled tire use cases

positive_anchors: Contemporary scholarly engagement with Greek Stoic philosophy in books or academic teaching
Current academic interpretation or revival of Stoic ideas in philosophy discourse
University-level or expert-led discussion of Stoicism as philosophy
negative_constraints: descriptions of individuals as stoic personality
discriminative_features: Academic-philosophical signal outweighs artistic signal
Need references to philosophers or formal scholarship
Exclude metaphorical use of stoic

positive_anchors: Country-level population-control policies with documented implementation outcomes
Evidence of actively pursued fertility reduction programs, especially policy design and measured impact
Comparative effectiveness of state interventions for population growth control, including China-focused cases
discriminative_features: Intervention must be active and intentional
Outcome evidence is required
China-relevant material is preferred by changed instruction

positive_anchors: Countries outside the United States that installed women in clergy pastor roles
National debates or policy decisions on women serving as church pastors
Documented ordination or acceptance trajectories for female clergy internationally
negative_constraints: American war or domestic politics context
non-pastoral roles such as nun or choir
discriminative_features: Must be outside US scope
Role specificity is pastor/clergy leadership
Need country-level evidence of approval or active consideration

positive_anchors: Early commercialization history of genetically modified food products
Regulatory and market context for first-wave GM food launches
Comparative discussion of GM food cases excluding Flavr Savr specifics
discriminative_features: Changed query explicitly excludes Flavr Savr details
Keep focus on broader GM commercialization context
Prefer first-to-market evidence across products

positive_anchors: French official response to South Pacific nuclear test protests with explicit attribution to Chirac
Statements or decisions personally tied to Jacques Chirac regarding protest handling
Policy actions reflecting Chirac-level accountability in the testing controversy
negative_constraints: generic France response without actor attribution
nuclear policy discussion outside South Pacific protests
discriminative_features: Response must be attributable to Chirac himself
Need both protest context and response action
Actor-level evidence matters more than country-level generality

positive_anchors: Engineering interventions used to stabilize the Leaning Tower of Pisa
Measured outcomes showing whether tower inclination changed after interventions
Project status updates on reinforcement and structural monitoring of the tower
negative_constraints: historical tourism coverage without stabilization measures
Pisa city history unrelated to tower engineering
discriminative_features: Need stabilization methods and outcomes
Exclude results centered on year-1990 references
Engineering evidence preferred over cultural commentary

positive_anchors: Hiring and earnings advantages associated with US college graduation
Labor-market studies comparing wage premiums for college graduates
Employer demand signals favoring higher education credentials in the United States
discriminative_features: Must center on college-vs-noncollege employment advantage
Exclude Manhattan-college-centric evidence per changed constraint
Need outcome signal in hiring or income
